<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="VersionResolution">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.VersionResolution">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">VersionResolution</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolved current translation version metadata.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationVersionLedger</span>
    <span class="n">identity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">created_track</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span>
    <span class="n">created_subversion</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="canonical_json_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.canonical_json_sha256">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">canonical_json_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">data</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Hash canonical JSON with stable key ordering and separators.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">sort_keys</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">separators</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;,&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;:&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">hashlib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="default_identity">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.default_identity">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">default_identity</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return deterministic local defaults when no identity file exists.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">username</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getpass</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getuser</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;unknown&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;user:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">username</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;booktx&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;human&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_identity">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.resolve_identity">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_identity</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve identity from explicit overrides, stored defaults, and fallbacks.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_identity</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">fallback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">default_identity</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">actor</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">fallback</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">harness</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">fallback</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">model</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">fallback</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="current_context_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.current_context_sha256">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">current_context_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the canonical context hash for the current project context.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;missing_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;translation context is missing. Run: booktx context init .&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">by_alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="current_baseline_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.current_baseline_sha256">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">current_baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the semantic baseline hash for the current project context.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;missing_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;translation context is missing. Run: booktx context init .&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="lookup_version">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.lookup_version">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">lookup_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationVersionLedger</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationTrackLedgerEntry</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslationSubversionLedgerEntry</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve one dotted version reference against the ledger.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">parsed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">track</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown_version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> not found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown_version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> not found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">track</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">subversion</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_current_version">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.resolve_current_version">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_current_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">force_new_context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_label</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">note</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">VersionResolution</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve and persist the current ledger version for a translation write.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">identity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_identity</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;missing_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;translation context is missing. Run: booktx context init .&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_hash</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">now</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">utc_timestamp</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">created_track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">created_subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

    <span class="n">track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">candidate</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">track</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">next_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()),</span> <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationTrackLedgerEntry</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">next_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">)]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">track</span>
        <span class="n">created_track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">updated_at</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">now</span>

    <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">force_new_context</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">baseline_hash</span>
                    <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_sha256</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">baseline_hash</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">next_subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()),</span> <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">next_subversion</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationSubversionLedgerEntry</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">next_subversion</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_hash</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)),</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_hash</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)),</span>
            <span class="n">context_label</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_label</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">notes</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">forced</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">force_new_context</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">)]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">subversion</span>
        <span class="n">created_subversion</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">updated_at</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">now</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">baseline_hash</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_label</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_label</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_label</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">note</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">notes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">note</span>

    <span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="n">write_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">VersionResolution</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_hash</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_hash</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">created_track</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">created_track</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">created_subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">created_subversion</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="select_active_version">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.select_active_version">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">select_active_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationVersionLedger</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Select the project-wide active version in the ledger.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lookup_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="n">write_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ledger</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="set_track_label">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.set_track_label">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">set_track_label</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">major_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">label</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationVersionLedger</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Set the label for one major track.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">track</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">major_version</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">track</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown_track&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;track </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">major_version</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> not found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">track</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">label</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">label</span>
    <span class="n">write_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ledger</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="fork_current_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.versioning.fork_current_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">fork_current_context</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">note</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_label</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">VersionResolution</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Force a new subversion even when the current baseline hash is unchanged.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">resolve_current_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">force_new_context</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_label</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_label</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">note</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
